announcement: Registration is now open for upcoming baseball and softball events.
name: Adventure Sports and Entertainment
about: Adventure Sports & Entertainment LLC was formed to provide a community resource for athletes. We partner with national training experts to offer teams and organizations the best training opportunities, then host weekend tournaments for national and regional teams that showcase their talent. As a premier destination, we offer great amenities at our park along with discounts to enjoy local attractions.
headline: A Premier Sporting Destination
address: 515 Monmouth Rd building 200, Jackson Township, NJ 08527, USA
parking: Free on-site parking is available. Overflow parking is available near the dome. Do not park in the side lots to the right of the A fields.
shortAddress: 515 Monmouth Rd building 200, Jackson Township, NJ 08527, USA
